issue_title: fix: add radius prop to RevealFx component in Carousel
issue_body_preview:
This would match the radius on the image. On bright images (and dark theme) you can see the radius disappearing and a sharp corner appears during the transition.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5d5718df-c858-47f0-9b50-335c67fb4315
test_description_zh: 在暗色主题下，打开包含明亮图片的 Carousel（轮播）组件，观察图片切换过渡动画期间，RevealFx 效果覆盖层的圆角是否与图片的圆角一致。
expected_result_zh: Carousel 中图片切换过渡期间，RevealFx 效果层的圆角应与图片本身的圆角完全匹配，不应出现尖锐直角或圆角消失的现象。
